commands.review_summary:
The PR adds caller-scoped cron RPC parameters, threads the calling agent identity from agent-tool and ACPX MCP sessions, enforces scoped cron CRUD/run/history in Gateway, updates generated Swift models, and expands focused tests.

PR surface: Source +532, Tests +783, Other +14. Total +1329 across 14 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main exposes the openclaw-tools MCP cron tool without an agent session key, while PR head threads callerScope through the agent tool and Gateway path and requires a managed session key for that MCP server.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR is draft, has a protected maintainer label, and the remaining blocker is maintainer acceptance of protocol, compatibility, and authorization-boundary behavior rather than a mechanical repair.
